tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glucose control. Lipid profile reveals high LDL and low HDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including renal function, electrolytes, and triglycerides, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of dyslipidemia and glycemic control.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

line.value: Calle de los Donantes de Sangre 3
